user_query: Could you assist me in retrieving the app configuration details? I require the menu version, splash screen duration, translations version, and Android version.

TaskList.description: Retrieve the menu version of the app configuration.
Retrieve the splash screen duration of the app configuration.
Retrieve the translations version of the app configuration.
Retrieve the Android version of the app configuration.
Compile the configuration details retrieved from subtasks 1 to 4.
